text: Verizon has increased its big-time dividend for 16 straight years. Kinder Morgan recently delivered its sixth straight annual dividend increase.

title: Kinder Morgan Is Positioned To Benefit From Natural Gas Production And Yields 6.78%
text: Kinder Morgan is well-positioned to benefit from increased natural gas production and future energy landscape, with its extensive pipeline network and terminals. The company has strong cash flows and a growing dividend, making it an attractive investment for income investors seeking large yields and capital appreciation prospects. KMI's focus on reducing debt, self-funding growth projects, and expanding its pipeline network ensures its continued relevance in the energy sector, with potential for share price growth.

title: Kinder Morgan: A Dividend Opportunity
text: Kinder Morgan Inc. offers a strong 6.63% dividend yield and is expected to have $4.8 billion available as distributable cash flows in 2023. Despite challenges from the push for renewable energy, natural gas and oil will still hold a significant portion of energy sources, making KMI a valuable investment. KMI's commitment to shareholders, strong FCF margins, and potential for share appreciation make it a buy at current prices.

title: Kinder Morgan: An Attractive Entry Price And Forward Growth Potential
text: Kinder Morgan, Inc. is one of the largest midstream companies in the United States and a long-time favorite of income-focused investors. The company enjoys remarkably stable cash flows regardless of energy prices. The company's focus on natural gas provides some significant near-term and medium-term growth potential.

title: Kinder Morgan: A 2015 Bear Selloff Redux Cannot Be Ruled Out
text: Kinder Morgan is now facing both a decline in energy-related sales and rising interest expense, similar to the bearish setup of 2015, which could negatively impact its stock price. The company's high debt level during a period of rising interest rates makes it a risky investment at the moment. I rate Kinder Morgan a Sell and Avoid due to these factors, with positive total return performance unlikely for owners during the next 6-12 months.

title: Kinder Morgan: Share Price Slump Provides Income Boost
text: Kinder Morgan is a diversified energy midstream company with a high dividend yield and shares trading below recent levels, presenting a potential buying opportunity. The company benefits from growing natural gas consumption in the US, as well as increasing exports via LNG, and has a project backlog of $3.7 billion. Kinder Morgan offers a 6.8% dividend yield and an undemanding valuation, with potential for significant total returns.

title: Here's Why Hold Strategy is Apt for Kinder Morgan (KMI) Stock
